_comment: Base game settings. Scene-specific overrides live in game-settings_scene-N.json. All keys here can be overridden per scene.

game._comment: buttonCaption: text displayed on the gameplay button. Override per scene in game-settings_scene-N.json.

background._comment: mode: 'color' fills the background with a solid color. Use 'image' and set pImage/lImage to texture keys for a background image.

ctaButton._comment: Portrait/landscape position and scale of the gameplay button in container-local coordinates.
